RULING - A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. The Court makes additional findings and rulings as fully reported in the reporter's transcript.

Order is signed. (See Scanned Order for Details)
